name: Valheim Dedicated Server
description: Iron Gate Studio Valheim Viking open-world survival dedicated server. Completely automates crossplay setups, world backups, customized modifiers, and BepInEx mod specifications.
install_script: echo "Downloading Valheim Dedicated Server (App ID 896660)..." && mkdir -p ~/.config/unity3d/IronGate/Valheim/worlds_local && echo "Complete."
